aboutPage.introPara: NovelPhere is a multilingual online novel reading and publishing platform dedicated to breaking language barriers so great stories can reach readers everywhere.
aboutPage.missionPara: We believe every story deserves to be heard by the world. No matter what language you write in, we provide the tools to help your work cross borders and reach a global audience.
aboutPage.feature1Desc: When authors publish a novel, our platform automatically translates the content into Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish using AI. Authors can review and revise translations before publishing.
aboutPage.feature2Desc: Readers can switch the interface and novel language at any time, enjoying a native reading experience in their preferred language.
aboutPage.feature3Desc: A complete suite of creation tools is built in — including novel creation, chapter editing, status management, and cover uploads — making the publishing workflow simple and efficient.
aboutPage.feature4Desc: Readers can bookmark their favorite novels and leave comments on individual paragraphs, building connections with authors and fellow readers.
aboutPage.authorsPara: We offer a zero-barrier publishing platform with AI translation support, helping your work simultaneously reach readers in six languages. Authors retain full copyright over their published content; the platform only assists with distribution and translation.
aboutPage.readersPara: We provide a rich and diverse library spanning fantasy, romance, sci-fi, mystery, and many more genres, updated continuously. Reading is free, bookmarking is open, and every story is accessible in your preferred language.
aboutPage.contactPara: For questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries, please reach us at:

termsPage.intro: Welcome to NovelPhere. Please read the following terms carefully before using the platform. By continuing to use the platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
termsPage.s1Body:
NovelPhere is a multilingual online novel reading and publishing platform offering novel reading, bookmarking, commenting, and AI-assisted translation services.

The platform is divided into a general content area and an 18+ adult content area. Accessing adult content requires age verification confirming the user is at least 18 years old.
termsPage.s2Body:
Users must register an account through the platform's registration process and ensure that the information provided is accurate and truthful.

You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and for all activities carried out under your account.

The platform reserves the right to suspend or permanently terminate accounts that violate these terms.
termsPage.s3Body:
Authors publishing content on this platform must comply with the following guidelines:

• Do not publish content that infringes on another party's copyright, trademark, or other intellectual property rights.
• Do not publish content that is illegal, defamatory, harassing, or constitutes hate speech.
• 18+ adult content must be clearly labeled using the designated tag. Authors must ensure such content complies with the platform's age restriction policies.
• Authors bear full legal responsibility for all content they publish. The platform does not guarantee the legality of third-party content.
termsPage.s4Body:
The AI auto-translation feature is provided for reference only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or literary quality of translated content.

Translations may contain errors. Authors are encouraged to review and revise AI translations before publishing. The platform is not liable for any misunderstandings or losses arising from AI translation inaccuracies.
termsPage.s5Body:
Works published to the platform remain the copyright of the original author. By publishing, authors grant the platform a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to display and translate the works in order to provide services to readers.

The platform's interface design, trademarks, code, and related assets are the property of NovelPhere and may not be reproduced or used without authorization.
termsPage.s6Body:
We value your privacy. User information collected by the platform is used solely for providing and improving our services and will not be sold to third parties.

For privacy-related inquiries, please contact contact@novelphere.com.
termsPage.s7Body:
The platform provides services "as is" without express or implied warranties regarding continuous availability, freedom from errors, or fitness for a particular purpose.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the platform shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the services.
termsPage.s8Body:
The platform reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. For material changes, we will notify users via platform announcements or email.

Continued use of the platform after modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
